title: Casablanca, Casablanca-Settat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Casablanca, Casablanca-Settat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Casablanca is a city in Casablanca-Settat with a population of 3,359,000. Morocco’s largest city and economic hub on the Atlantic coast, known for its vibrant markets, Art Deco architecture, and growing business district.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
